category_sources: source_facts.description: "Apache Parquet command-line tools and utilities".
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Parquet project site; source_facts.name identifies the packaged CLI as parquet-cli.
docs_sources: Official Apache Parquet site has a dedicated /docs/ documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/apache/parquet-java; returned null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Apache Parquet CLI utilities; source_facts.repo indicates parquet-java implementation.
